utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides separate entries for physical and mental with plan names and monthly costs—fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes a home coverage plan name and monthly cost—sufficiently specified for home/contents insurance. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists multiple travel-related plans with costs; while granular per person, it still fulfills travel insurance with costs—considered fully specified. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists multiple services and costs—fully specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes monthly subtotal, discount, final monthly cost, and annual one-time costs—fully specified.
